name: Chicken on a Biscuit
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the Chicken broth, Bisquick, milk, powdered turmeric, poultry seasoning, paprika, salt, and pepper in a blender. Blend on high speed for 1 minute or until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart saucepan. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until thick and smooth.
3. Reduce the heat to low. Stir in the diced cooked chicken until heated through thoroughly.
4. Split buttermilk biscuits in half and arrange them in oval-shaped serving dishes. Spoon equal amounts of chicken and gravy on top of each biscuit, allowing one biscuit per serving.
